calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Appearances:
William Edward Weiss Esq. for Plaintiff Livingston Mix LLP. present by Dennis Livingston, Agent, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Livingston Mix LLP. and against the defendant Claude-Alix Bertrand and Standing Room Only, Cal. Corp.
Principal of $22,698.75
Interest of $2,991.56
Attorney's fees of $7,500.00
Costs of $275.68
For the total of $33,465.99
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Continued To Jun-24-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lee Batara..
No appearances, this matter is continued to June 24, 2003 at 9:00 AM.
Plaintiff filed notice of hearing for June 24, 2003.
